title: HighlightOres
description: Added highlighted edges to all the ores to make them a lot easier to find
body:
[**![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fd2f0f5-1266-429b-b91c-d015a2026f31.webp)**](https://blocklegend001.dev/bh)

This is a simple texture pack that highlights all the ores

NOTICE:
This resourcepack is not an XRAY.
